Tackled by M.Fairchild at CLB 25.
M.McCrane kicks 63 yards from DC 30 to the CLB 7. J.Moore returns the kickoff. Tackled by M.Fairchild at CLB 25.

item.description: THREE-POINT CONVERSION ATTEMPT.
J.McClendon steps back to pass.
Sacked at DC 10 for yards (J.Wallace).
J.McClendon FUMBLES, forced by J.Wallace.
Fumble RECOVERED by DC-D.Anderson at DC 7.
THREE-POINT ATTEMPT FAILS.

THREE-POINT CONVERSION ATTEMPT. J.McClendon steps back to pass. Sacked at DC 10 for yards (J.Wallace). J.McClendon FUMBLES, forced by J.Wallace. Fumble RECOVERED by DC-D.Anderson at DC 7. THREE-POINT ATTEMPT FAILS.
item.scoring_description: J.McClendon pass short right complete. Catch made by T.Martin for 3 yards. TOUCHDOWN. PENALTY on DC-D.Roberson, Defensive Offside, 5 yards, declined.
